**This repository is part of a demo and should not be used as a reference for production decisions. All content was generated by AI (Claude).**

# Networking ADRs

Architecture Decision Records for a Kubernetes networking stack. This repo exists to demonstrate multi-repo ADR support in [Backstage](https://backstage.io) as part of the [backstage-adrs](https://github.com/brandisher/backstage-adrs) demo.

See the main demo repo for setup instructions.
